channel.title: standards compliant on Hugo O. Rivera
channel.description: Recent content in standards compliant on Hugo O. Rivera

item.title: html5seo
item.description: An HTML5 template containing metadata described by the Twitter card, Facebook's Open Graph Protocol, Google's JSON+LD, and HTML5 standards.

item.title: CORE
item.description: Implementation of SPJ's Tutorial Core compilers in modern Haskell (unfinished)

item.title: SCMinHS
item.description: A Scheme Implementation in Haskell. Followed “Write Yourself a Scheme in 48 Hours.”
